judge_result.short_rationale: Correctly says remove contaminated clothing and wash skin, but it omits the required immediate action to seek medical attention for any skin exposure and weakens it to only if irritation persists. It also adds eye-flushing guidance for a skin-exposure incident and an unsupported do-not instruction.

  "short_rationale": "Correctly says remove contaminated clothing and wash skin, but it omits the required immediate action to seek medical attention for any skin exposure and weakens it to only if irritation persists.
